title: Junior Product Manager
description: Atlassian serves 2M+ customers with tools like Jira, Confluence, and Bitbucket. Our mission is to unleash the potential of every team. As a Junior Product Manager, you'll have the autonomy to drive strategy for features used by millions.
responsibilities: Define product requirements for assigned features and user stories
Work with engineering to break down features into technical tasks
Gather customer feedback through interviews and user testing
Create product specifications and success metrics
Prioritize roadmap items based on customer value and business impact
Support go-to-market planning for new feature launches

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Computer Science, Engineering, or related field
requirements.experience_years: 2-4 years of product, business, or program management experience

benefits: Competitive health, dental, and vision coverage
Unlimited PTO and remote work flexibility
Equity options and/or stock purchase plan
